revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dashboard.wikiedu.org_assignment here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:#if:{{{{{subst|subst:}}}ns:0}} |[[File:Sciences humaines.svg|40px]] This article {{#switch: {{yesno |{{{ended| {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{#time:U|{{{end_date}}}}} < {{#time:U}}}}}} }}} |no=no |blank= |def={{{ended}}} }} |T|yes=was |F|no=is currently |#default=is or was }} the subject of a Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment{{#if:{{{term|}}}| in {{{term}}}}}{{#if: {{{start_date|}}} |{{#if: {{{end_date|}}} |, between {{#dateformat:{{{start_date}}}|dmy}} and {{#dateformat:{{{end_date}}}|dmy}} {{#ifexpr:{{#time:U|{{{end_date|2020-01-01}}}}} < {{#time:U|{{{start_date|2019-01-01}}}}} |{{error|. start_date should be before end_date}} }} |, starting {{#dateformat:{{{start_date}}}|dmy}} }} |{{#if: {{{end_date|}}} |, until {{#dateformat:{{{end_date}}}|dmy}} }} }}. {{#if:{{{course|}}}|Further details are available [[{{{course}}}|on the course page]]. {{#if:{{{assignments|}}}|Student editor(s): {{{assignments}}}{{#iferror:{{PAGENAME:{{link target|link={{{assignments|}}}}}}}|| ([https://xtools.wmflabs.org/topedits/en.wikipedia.org/{{urlencode:{{PAGENAME:{{link target|link={{{assignments|}}}}}}}}}/0/{{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}} article contribs])}}. }} {{#if:{{{reviewers|}}}|Peer reviewers: {{{reviewers}}}. }} {{#if:{{{scholar|}}}|Visiting Scholar {{{scholar}}} has worked on it. }} }} |[[File:Sciences humaines.svg|40px]] This article {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}yesno |{{{ended| {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#iferror:{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#expr:{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:U|{{{end_date}}}}} < {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:U}}}}}} }}} |no=no |blank= |def={{{ended}}} }} |T|yes=was |F|no=is currently |#default=is or was }} the subject of a Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{term|}}}| in {{{term}}}}}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if: {{{start_date|}}} |{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if: {{{end_date|}}} |, between {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#dateformat:{{{start_date}}}|dmy}} and {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#dateformat:{{{end_date}}}|dmy}} {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifexpr:{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:U|{{{end_date|2020-01-01}}}}} < {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:U|{{{start_date|2019-01-01}}}}} |{{error|. start_date should be before end_date}} }} |, starting {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#dateformat:{{{start_date}}}|dmy}} }} |{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if: {{{end_date|}}} |, until {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#dateformat:{{{end_date}}}|dmy}} }} }}. {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{course|}}}|Further details are available [[{{{course}}}|on the course page]]. {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{assignments|}}}|Student editor(s): {{{assignments}}}{{#iferror:{{PAGENAME:{{link target|link={{{assignments|}}}}}}}|| ([https://xtools.wmflabs.org/topedits/en.wikipedia.org/{{urlencode:{{PAGENAME:{{link target|link={{{assignments|}}}}}}}}}/0/{{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}} article contribs]}}. }} {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{reviewers|}}}|Peer reviewers: {{{reviewers}}}. }} {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{scholar|}}}|Visiting Scholar {{{scholar}}} has worked on it. }} }} }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Wikiedu.org course templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:#if:{{{{{subst|subst:}}}ns:0}} |[[File:Sciences humaines.svg|40px]] This article {{#switch: {{yesno |{{{ended| {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{#time:U|{{{end_date}}}}} < {{#time:U}}}}}} }}} |no=no |blank= |def={{{ended}}} }} |T|yes=was |F|no=is currently |#default=is or was }} the subject of a Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment{{#if:{{{term|}}}| in {{{term}}}}}{{#if: {{{start_date|}}} |{{#if: {{{end_date|}}} |, between {{#dateformat:{{{start_date}}}|dmy}} and {{#dateformat:{{{end_date}}}|dmy}} {{#ifexpr:{{#time:U|{{{end_date|2020-01-01}}}}} < {{#time:U|{{{start_date|2019-01-01}}}}} |{{error|. start_date should be before end_date}} }} |, starting {{#dateformat:{{{start_date}}}|dmy}} }} |{{#if: {{{end_date|}}} |, until {{#dateformat:{{{end_date}}}|dmy}} }} }}. {{#if:{{{course|}}}|Further details are available [[{{{course}}}|on the course page]]. {{#if:{{{assignments|}}}|Student editor(s): {{{assignments}}}{{#iferror:{{PAGENAME:{{link target|link={{{assignments|}}}}}}}|| ([https://xtools.wmflabs.org/topedits/en.wikipedia.org/{{urlencode:{{PAGENAME:{{link target|link={{{assignments|}}}}}}}}}/0/{{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}} article contribs])}}. }} {{#if:{{{reviewers|}}}|Peer reviewers: {{{reviewers}}}. }} {{#if:{{{scholar|}}}|Visiting Scholar {{{scholar}}} has worked on it. }} }} |[[File:Sciences humaines.svg|40px]] This article {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}yesno |{{{ended| {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#iferror:{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#expr:{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:U|{{{end_date}}}}} < {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:U}}}}}} }}} |no=no |blank= |def={{{ended}}} }} |T|yes=was |F|no=is currently |#default=is or was }} the subject of a Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{term|}}}| in {{{term}}}}}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if: {{{start_date|}}} |{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if: {{{end_date|}}} |, between {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#dateformat:{{{start_date}}}|dmy}} and {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#dateformat:{{{end_date}}}|dmy}} {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifexpr:{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:U|{{{end_date|2020-01-01}}}}} < {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:U|{{{start_date|2019-01-01}}}}} |{{error|. start_date should be before end_date}} }} |, starting {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#dateformat:{{{start_date}}}|dmy}} }} |{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if: {{{end_date|}}} |, until {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#dateformat:{{{end_date}}}|dmy}} }} }}. {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{course|}}}|Further details are available [[{{{course}}}|on the course page]]. {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{assignments|}}}|Student editor(s): {{{assignments}}}{{#iferror:{{PAGENAME:{{link target|link={{{assignments|}}}}}}}|| ([https://xtools.wmflabs.org/topedits/en.wikipedia.org/{{urlencode:{{PAGENAME:{{link target|link={{{assignments|}}}}}}}}}/0/{{urlencode:{{PAGENAME}}}} article contribs]}}. }} {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{reviewers|}}}|Peer reviewers: {{{reviewers}}}. }}
